name: codesys-mcp-sp21-plus-ch
description: Codesys-MCP-SP21+ (Chinese-friendly fork) -- downstream of phobicdotno/Codesys-MCP-SP21-plus adding byte-exact UTF-8 / Chinese round-trip for POU declarations, implementations, comments and the get_all_pou_code bulk-read path in both persistent and headless modes. Inherits the SP22 Patch 1 fixes (script-engine API drift, online/runtime tool auto-login, dual-SHA release classifier, set_pou_code omitted-decl wipe fix, add_library managed-overload, etc.). MCP server for CODESYS with persistent UI instance and file-based IPC.
author: Limhslog (Codesys-MCP-SP21-plus-ch); phobicdotno (upstream SP21+ fork); luke-harriman (upstream original)
